Title: Array Sum
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers and print sum.

Title: Array Maximum
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers and print maximum.

Title: Count Even
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers and print count of even elements.

Title: Positive Count
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers and print count of positive numbers.

Title: Array Average
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers and print integer average.

Title: Array Minimum
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers and print minimum.

Title: Count Odd
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers and print count of odd elements.

Title: Negative Count
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers and print count of strictly negative numbers.

Title: First Element
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers and print the first element.

Title: Last Element
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers and print the last element.

Title: Linear Search
Problem_Statement: Read n, n integers, key. Print Found or Not Found.

Title: Array Reverse
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers and print reverse space separated.

Title: Second Largest
Problem_Statement: Read n and n distinct integers and print second largest.

Title: Frequency Key
Problem_Statement: Read n, n integers, key. Print frequency of key.

Title: Adjacent Pair Sum
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers and print maximum adjacent pair sum.

Title: Check Sorted Ascending
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers. Print Sorted if non-decreasing else Not Sorted.

Title: Sum of Even Indexed
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers. Print sum of elements at 0-based even indices.

Title: Replace Negatives Zero
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers. Print array replacing negative values with 0 space separated.

Title: Count Greater Average
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers. Print count of elements strictly greater than exact average.

Title: Copy Array
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers. Copy into second array and print second array space separated.

Title: Mean Variance StdDev
Problem_Statement:
Write a C program to input N real numbers in 1-D array. Compute mean, variance and Standard Deviation.
[Mean= sum/N, Variance = Σ (Xi-mean)^2 /N, STD Deviation= √variance.]
Read integer N then N float numbers. Print Mean, Variance, and Std Dev rounded to 2 decimal places space separated (e.g. '2.00 0.67 0.82').

Title: Binary Search Sorted
Problem_Statement:
Write a C program to perform a binary search for a given key integer in a single dimensional array of numbers in ascending order and report success or failure in the form of a suitable message.
Read N, N sorted integers, then Key. Print 'Success: Found at index X' (0-based) or 'Failure: Key not found'.

Title: Selection Sort Display
Problem_Statement:
Write a C program to input N integer numbers into a single dimension array, sort them into ascending order using selection sort technique, and print both given array and sorted array with suitable headings.
Read N then N integers. Output exact format:
Given Array: <space separated elements>
Sorted Array: <space separated elements>

Title: Pair Sum Target
Problem_Statement: Read n, n distinct integers, target. Print Yes if any pair sums to target else No.

Title: Majority Element
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers. Print element appearing strictly more than n/2 times else -1.

Title: Rotate Left One
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers. Rotate array left by 1 position and print space separated.

Title: Longest Increasing Subarray
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers. Print length of longest strictly increasing contiguous subarray.

Title: Max Min Difference
Problem_Statement: Read n and n integers. Print difference between maximum and minimum elements.
